WaterSubsoil.description: Amount of water required to hydrate one bag of subsoil per day

WaterTopsoil.description: Amount of water required to hydrate one bag of topsoil per day

MaxTotalBags.description: Maximum number of bags of topsoil and subsoil combined

MinTopsoilBags.description: Minimum number of topsoil bags to be used

MaxTopsoilProportion.description: Maximum proportion of bags that can be topsoil
